images.title: Wander often, wonder more
images.caption: National Trails Day
images.copyrightonly: © The best photo is earned/Getty Images Plus
images.desc: If your screen time has been winning lately, today is a good time to change that—we suggest hiking. National Trails Day, created in 1993 by the American Hiking Society, nudges people toward exploring trails.

tooltips.walle: This image is not available to download as wallpaper.
